26	}

116	
117	export function renderConsole(v: ConsoleView): string {
118	  const sessJson = JSON.stringify(v.sessions).replace(/</g, "\\u003c");
119	  const dirsJson = JSON.stringify(v.knownDirs).replace(/</g, "\\u003c");
120	  const dirOptions = v.knownDirs
121	    .map((d) => `<option value="${d.replace(/"/g, "&quot;")}">${d.replace(/</g, "&lt;")}</option>`)
122	    .join("");
123	
124	  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
125	<html lang="zh">
126	<head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>attend — console</title><style>${STYLE}</style></head>
127	<body>
128	<div class="side">
129	  <h1>attend <span class="accent">${v.sessions.length} sessions · ${v.briefCount} briefs</span></h1>
130	  <div class="topnav">
131	    <button id="newToggle">+ new</button>
132	  </div>
133	  <div class="newbox" id="newbox">
134	    <select id="ndsel"><option value="">— pick a project dir —</option>${dirOptions}</select>
135	    <input id="ndfree" placeholder="…or paste an absolute path">
136	    <input id="np" placeholder="first message">
137	    <button id="nbtn" class="send" style="color:white;background:#1f2937;border-color:#1f2937">start session ▸</button>
138	    <div class="nmsg" id="nmsg"></div>
139	  </div>
140	  <div id="list"></div>
141	</div>
142	<div class="main">
143	  <div class="head">
144	    <div><div class="t" id="h-title">attend</div><div class="s" id="h-sub">select a session, or + new</div><div class="sig" id="h-sig"></div></div>
145	    <div class="status"><span class="sdot" id="st-dot"></span><span id="st-txt">idle</span></div>
146	  </div>
147	  <div id="msgs"><div class="placeholder" id="ph">Pick a session on the left to see its chat, then type below to continue it — all in the browser.</div></div>
148	  <div class="foot">
149	    <textarea id="input" placeholder="message (Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline)"></textarea>
150	    <button class="splitbtn" id="forkBtn" title="branch this session into a fork (uses your draft as the opening turn)" disabled>fork ⑂</button>
151	    <button class="send" id="send">send</button>
152	  </div>
153	</div>
154	<script>
155	window.__SESSIONS__ = ${sessJson};
156	window.__DIRS__ = ${dirsJson};
157	</script>
158	<script>
159	(function(){
160	  var SESS = window.__SESSIONS__ || [];
161	  var cur = null, es = null, assistantEl = null;
162	  var thinkingEl = null, thinkTimer = null, thinkStart = 0, turnActive = false;
163	  function byId(id){ return document.getElementById(id); }
164	  function el(tag, cls, txt){ var e=document.createElement(tag); if(cls)e.className=cls; if(txt!=null)e.textContent=txt; return e; }
165	  function scroll(){ var m=byId('msgs'); m.scrollTop=m.scrollHeight; }
166	  function clearPh(){ var p=byId('ph'); if(p) p.remove(); }
167	
168	  // --- per-session lifecycle feedback ---
169	  function setStatus(state, txt){ var d=byId('st-dot'); if(d) d.className='sdot '+(state||''); var t=byId('st-txt'); if(t) t.textContent=txt; }
170	  function startThinking(){
171	    clearThinking();
172	    thinkingEl=addMsg('assistant',''); thinkingEl.className='msg assistant thinking';
173	    thinkStart=Date.now();
174	    var tick=function(){ var s=Math.round((Date.now()-thinkStart)/1000); var b=thinkingEl&&thinkingEl.querySelector('.bubble');
175	      if(b) b.textContent = s<20 ? ('working… '+s+'s') : ('working… '+s+'s (still waiting for first response)'); };
176	    tick(); thinkTimer=setInterval(tick,1000); setStatus('working','working…');
177	  }
178	  function clearThinking(){ if(thinkTimer){ clearInterval(thinkTimer); thinkTimer=null; } if(thinkingEl){ thinkingEl.remove(); thinkingEl=null; } }
179	  function endTurn(){ clearThinking(); turnActive=false; var sb=byId('send'); if(sb) sb.disabled=false; setStatus(es?'live':'idle', es?'live':'idle'); }
180	
181	  function sortSessions(){
182	    var mode=(byId('sort')||{}).value||'recent';
183	    if(mode==='priority'){ SESS.sort(function(a,b){ return (b.score||0)-(a.score||0); }); }
184	    else { SESS.sort(function(a,b){ return (a.ageDays==null?1e9:a.ageDays)-(b.ageDays==null?1e9:b.ageDays); }); }
185	  }
186	  function renderSidebar(){
187	    var list=byId('list'); list.innerHTML='';
188	    SESS.forEach(function(s){
189	      var item=el('div','item'+(cur&&cur.sessionId===s.sessionId?' active':''));
190	      item.title = s.reason || '';
191	      // title = brief (easy to locate by task); fall back to first prompt
192	      item.appendChild(el('div','it-title', (s.brief?s.brief.name:(s.title||'(no prompt)'))));
193	      // keep the session's first sentence visible as a subtitle when a brief took the title
194	      if(s.brief && s.title) item.appendChild(el('div','it-firstline', s.title));
195	      var meta=el('div','it-meta');
196	      if(s.pattern && s.pattern!=='unknown') meta.appendChild(el('span','pat '+s.pattern, s.pattern));
197	      meta.appendChild(el('span',null, (s.score!=null?Number(s.score).toFixed(1)+' · ':'')+s.vendor+' · '+s.project+' · '+s.prompts+'p/'+s.actions+'a'+(s.ageDays!=null?(' · '+s.ageDays+'d'):'')));
198	      item.appendChild(meta);
199	      if(s.reason) item.appendChild(el('div','it-reason', s.reason));
200	      item.onclick=function(){ select(s); };
201	      list.appendChild(item);
202	    });
203	  }
204	  function setForkEnabled(on, title){
205	    var b=byId('forkBtn'); if(!b) return; b.disabled=!on; if(title!=null) b.title=title;
206	  }
207	  function addMsg(role, text){ clearPh(); var m=el('div','msg '+role); var b=el('div','bubble',text||''); m.appendChild(b); byId('msgs').appendChild(m); scroll(); return m; }
208	  var toolEls = {}; // tool_use id -> details element (to attach the result later)
209	  function toolPreview(name, input){
210	    try {
211	      if(!input || typeof input!=='object') return '';
212	      if(name==='Bash' && input.command) return String(input.command).split('\\n')[0].slice(0,90);
213	      if(input.file_path) return String(input.file_path);
214	      if(input.path) return String(input.path);
215	      if(input.pattern) return String(input.pattern);
216	      var k=Object.keys(input)[0]; return k?(k+': '+String(input[k]).slice(0,70)):'';
217	    } catch(e){ return ''; }
218	  }
219	  function fmt(v){ try { return typeof v==='string'?v:JSON.stringify(v,null,2); } catch(e){ return String(v); } }
220	  // tc = { name, input, result?, isError? }
221	  function addTool(tc){
222	    clearPh();
223	    var d=el('details','toolc');
224	    var prev=toolPreview(tc.name, tc.input);
225	    d.appendChild(el('summary',null,'⚙ '+tc.name+(prev?(' — '+prev):'')));
226	    if(tc.input!=null && !(typeof tc.input==='object' && Object.keys(tc.input).length===0)){
227	      d.appendChild(el('pre','tool-in', fmt(tc.input)));
228	    }
229	    var out=el('pre','tool-out'+(tc.isError?' err':''));
230	    if(tc.result!=null && tc.result!==''){ out.textContent=String(tc.result).slice(0,8000); } else { out.style.display='none'; }
231	    d.appendChild(out);
232	    byId('msgs').appendChild(d); scroll();
233	    return d;
234	  }
235	
236	  function select(s){
237	    cur=s; renderSidebar();
238	    // top shows BOTH: brief as the title (locate by task), first sentence as subtitle
239	    byId('h-title').textContent = s.brief ? s.brief.name : (s.title || s.project || 'session');
240	    byId('h-sub').textContent = s.title || (s.vendor+' · '+(s.cwd||''));
241	    // signals inline (no click needed): brief · pattern · priority · reason
242	    var sig=byId('h-sig'); sig.innerHTML='';
243	    sig.appendChild(el('span','briefref', s.brief ? ('task: '+s.brief.name) : 'no task brief'));
244	    if(s.pattern && s.pattern!=='unknown') sig.appendChild(el('span','pat '+s.pattern, s.pattern));
245	    if(s.score!=null) sig.appendChild(el('span','score','priority '+s.score.toFixed(1)));
246	    if(s.etaMin!=null) sig.appendChild(el('span','eta','~'+s.etaMin+'m to handle'));
247	    if(s.reason && s.reason!=='no signal') sig.appendChild(el('span','reason', s.reason));
248	    // in-browser fork only works for Claude sessions; Codex must use the terminal launcher
249	    var canFork = !!(s && s.sessionId && s.vendor==='claude' && !s.pendingFork);
250	    var ftitle = canFork ? 'branch this session into a fork'
251	      : (s && s.vendor!=='claude' ? 'in-browser split is Claude-only — use the terminal launcher for Codex' : 'select a Claude session to split');
252	    setForkEnabled(canFork, ftitle);
253	    byId('msgs').innerHTML=''; assistantEl=null;
254	    if(es){ es.close(); es=null; }
255	    clearThinking(); turnActive=false; var sb=byId('send'); if(sb) sb.disabled=false; setStatus('idle','idle');
256	    if(s.pendingFork){
257	      addMsg('assistant','(forked — type your next message to continue this branch in a new direction)');
258	    } else if(s.file){
259	      fetch('/chat/messages?file='+encodeURIComponent(s.file)).then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(msgs){
260	        if(!msgs.length) addMsg('assistant','(no history yet)');
261	        msgs.forEach(function(m){ if(m.text) addMsg(m.role, m.text); (m.tools||[]).forEach(function(t){ addTool(t); }); });
262	      });
263	    }
264	  }
265	  function openStream(id){
266	    if(es) es.close();
267	    es=new EventSource('/chat/stream?session='+encodeURIComponent(id));
268	    es.onopen=function(){ setStatus(turnActive?'working':'live', turnActive?'working…':'live'); };
269	    es.onmessage=function(e){ onEvent(JSON.parse(e.data)); };
270	    es.onerror=function(){ setStatus('err', (es&&es.readyState===2)?'disconnected':'reconnecting…'); };
271	  }
272	  function onEvent(ev){
273	    if(ev.kind==='assistant_text'){ clearThinking(); if(!assistantEl) assistantEl=addMsg('assistant',''); var b=assistantEl.querySelector('.bubble'); b.textContent+=ev.text; scroll(); }
274	    else if(ev.kind==='tool_use'){ clearThinking(); assistantEl=null; var d=addTool({name:ev.name,input:ev.input}); if(ev.id) toolEls[ev.id]=d; }
275	    else if(ev.kind==='tool_result'){ assistantEl=null; var t=ev.id?toolEls[ev.id]:null;
276	      if(t){ var o=t.querySelector('.tool-out'); o.textContent=String(ev.text||'').slice(0,8000); o.style.display=''; if(ev.isError) o.className='tool-out err'; }
277	      else { addTool({name:'result',input:null,result:ev.text,isError:ev.isError}); }
278	      scroll(); }
279	    else if(ev.kind==='result'){ assistantEl=null; endTurn(); }
280	    else if(ev.kind==='error'){ clearThinking(); assistantEl=null; addMsg('error','⚠ '+ev.message); turnActive=false; var sb=byId('send'); if(sb) sb.disabled=false; setStatus('err','error'); }
281	  }
282	  function send(){
283	    var inp=byId('input'); var text=inp.value.trim(); if(!text||!cur) return;
284	    if(cur.pendingFork){ materializeFork(cur,text); return; }
285	    if(!cur.sessionId) return;
286	    addMsg('user',text); inp.value=''; assistantEl=null;
287	    turnActive=true; byId('send').disabled=true; startThinking();
288	    var id=cur.sessionId, cwd=cur.cwd||'';
289	    fetch('/chat/send?session='+encodeURIComponent(id)+'&cwd='+encodeURIComponent(cwd),{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
290	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){
291	        if(res.ok){ if(!es) openStream(id); }
292	        else { addMsg('error','⚠ '+(res.error||'send failed — this session may no longer be running')); endTurn(); }
293	      })
294	      .catch(function(e){ addMsg('error','⚠ network error: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)); endTurn(); });
295	  }
296	  function fork(){
297	    if(!cur||!cur.sessionId){ alert('Pick a session on the left before splitting.'); return; }
298	    if(cur.vendor!=='claude'){ alert('In-browser split is Claude-only. Use the terminal launcher to fork a Codex session.'); return; }
299	    if(cur.pendingFork){ byId('input').focus(); return; }
300	    // Open the branch immediately, empty and ready. The real fork is materialized
301	    // lazily on the first message: the Agent SDK only mints the new session id once
302	    // it has a turn to diverge on, so we defer the actual /chat/fork until send().
303	    // If you'd already typed something, that becomes the branch's opening turn —
304	    // "I typed this, but it's better off as a split" — and we materialize now.
305	    var inp=byId('input'); var text=inp.value.trim();
306	    var ns={vendor:'claude',sessionId:'pending-'+Date.now(),pendingFork:{parent:cur.sessionId,cwd:cur.cwd||''},title:'(fork) '+(cur.title||''),cwd:cur.cwd,project:cur.project,file:'',ageDays:0,prompts:0,actions:0,brief:cur.brief};
307	    SESS.unshift(ns); select(ns);
308	    if(text){ materializeFork(ns,text); } else { inp.focus(); }
309	  }
310	  // Turn a pending fork into a real session using its first message.
311	  function materializeFork(branch,text){
312	    var inp=byId('input'); byId('msgs').innerHTML=''; addMsg('user',text); inp.value=''; assistantEl=null;
313	    fetch('/chat/fork?session='+encodeURIComponent(branch.pendingFork.parent)+'&cwd='+encodeURIComponent(branch.pendingFork.cwd),
314	      {method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
315	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){ if(!res.ok){ addMsg('error','⚠ '+(res.error||'fork failed')); return; }
316	        branch.sessionId=res.session; branch.pendingFork=null;
317	        if(cur===branch){ renderSidebar(); setForkEnabled(true,'branch this session into a fork'); }
318	        openStream(res.session); })
319	      .catch(function(e){ addMsg('error','⚠ fork failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)); });
320	  }
321	  function newSession(){
322	    var dir=byId('ndfree').value.trim()||byId('ndsel').value; var text=byId('np').value.trim();
323	    if(!dir){ byId('nmsg').textContent='pick or paste a directory'; return; }
324	    if(!text){ byId('nmsg').textContent='type a first message'; return; }
325	    fetch('/chat/new?cwd='+encodeURIComponent(dir),{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
326	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){ if(!res.ok){ byId('nmsg').textContent=res.error||'failed'; return; }
327	        var ns={vendor:'claude',sessionId:res.session,title:text,cwd:dir,project:(dir.split(/[\\\\/]/).pop()),file:'',ageDays:0,prompts:1,actions:0,brief:null};
328	        SESS.unshift(ns); select(ns); addMsg('user',text); openStream(res.session);
329	        byId('np').value=''; byId('nmsg').textContent=''; byId('newbox').classList.remove('open'); });
330	  }
331	
332	  sortSessions();
333	  renderSidebar();
334	  byId('send').onclick=send;
335	  byId('forkBtn').onclick=fork;
336	  byId('nbtn').onclick=newSession;
337	  byId('newToggle').onclick=function(){ byId('newbox').classList.toggle('open'); };
338	  byId('input').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey&&!e.isComposing){ e.preventDefault(); send(); } });
339	})();
340	</script>
341	</body>
342	</html>`;
343	}

1	import { EventEmitter } from "node:events";
2	import {
3	  type Options,
4	  type PermissionMode,
5	  type SDKUserMessage,
6	  query,
7	} from "@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk";
8	import { type UiEvent, toUiEvents } from "./events.js";
9	
10	/** A pushable async queue of user messages — the streaming-input prompt for query(). */
11	class InputQueue implements AsyncIterable<SDKUserMessage> {
12	  private items: SDKUserMessage[] = [];
13	  private waiters: Array<(r: IteratorResult<SDKUserMessage>) => void> = [];
14	  private closed = false;
15	
16	  push(text: string): void {
17	    const msg: SDKUserMessage = {
18	      type: "user",
19	      message: { role: "user", content: text },
20	      parent_tool_use_id: null,
21	    };
22	    const w = this.waiters.shift();
23	    if (w) w({ value: msg, done: false });
24	    else this.items.push(msg);
25	  }
26	
27	  close(): void {
28	    this.closed = true;
29	    const w = this.waiters.shift();
30	    if (w) w({ value: undefined as unknown as SDKUserMessage, done: true });
31	  }
32	
33	  [Symbol.asyncIterator](): AsyncIterator<SDKUserMessage> {
34	    return {
35	      next: (): Promise<IteratorResult<SDKUserMessage>> => {
36	        const item = this.items.shift();
37	        if (item) return Promise.resolve({ value: item, done: false });
38	        if (this.closed) return Promise.resolve({ value: undefined as never, done: true });
39	        return new Promise((resolve) => this.waiters.push(resolve));
40	      },
41	    };
42	  }
43	}
44	
45	export interface LiveRun {
46	  /** known once the SDK emits its init message */
47	  sessionId: string | null;
48	  cwd: string;
49	  vendor: "claude";
50	  input: InputQueue;
51	  events: UiEvent[];
52	  emitter: EventEmitter;
53	  done: boolean;
54	}
55	
56	export interface StartOpts {
57	  cwd: string;
58	  resume?: string;
59	  forkSession?: boolean;
60	  firstText?: string;
61	  permissionMode?: PermissionMode;
62	}
63	
64	/** Injectable so tests can drive the engine without the real SDK / network. */
65	export type QueryFn = typeof query;
66	
67	const MAX_BUFFER = 2000;
68	
69	/**
70	 * Runs and tracks live Claude sessions via the Agent SDK. Each run streams SDK
71	 * messages, normalizes them to UiEvents, buffers them (so a (re)connecting SSE
72	 * client catches up), and re-emits for live subscribers. No terminal involved.
73	 */
74	export class ChatEngine {
75	  private runs = new Map<string, LiveRun>();
76	
77	  constructor(private readonly queryFn: QueryFn = query) {}
78	
79	  get(sessionId: string): LiveRun | undefined {
80	    return this.runs.get(sessionId);
81	  }
82	
83	  /**
84	   * Start (or resume/fork) a run. Resolves with the session id once the SDK
85	   * reports it (from the init message). For resume, the id is known up front.
86	   */
87	  start(opts: StartOpts): Promise<string> {
88	    const run: LiveRun = {
89	      sessionId: opts.resume && !opts.forkSession ? opts.resume : null,
90	      cwd: opts.cwd,
91	      vendor: "claude",
92	      input: new InputQueue(),
93	      events: [],
94	      emitter: new EventEmitter(),
95	      done: false,
96	    };
97	    // index immediately under resume id so /chat/send can find it before init
98	    if (run.sessionId) this.runs.set(run.sessionId, run);
99	
100	    // Default to full CLI-parity execution: the console is a local, single-user
101	    // surface and the user wants the same power as running `claude` directly.
102	    // `acceptEdits` (the old default) auto-denied Bash/etc., so Claude reported
103	    // it was "sandboxed" and could not run anything.
104	    const mode: PermissionMode = opts.permissionMode ?? "bypassPermissions";
105	    const options: Options = {
106	      cwd: opts.cwd,
107	      permissionMode: mode,
108	      ...(mode === "bypassPermissions" ? { allowDangerouslySkipPermissions: true } : {}),
109	      ...(opts.resume ? { resume: opts.resume } : {}),
110	      ...(opts.forkSession ? { forkSession: true } : {}),
111	    };
112	
113	    return new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => {
114	      let resolved = false;
115	      const settle = (id: string) => {
116	        if (resolved) return;
117	        resolved = true;
118	        resolve(id);
119	      };
120	
121	      const emit = (ev: UiEvent) => {
122	        run.events.push(ev);
123	        if (run.events.length > MAX_BUFFER) run.events.shift();
124	        if (ev.kind === "session" && ev.sessionId) {
125	          run.sessionId = ev.sessionId;
126	          this.runs.set(ev.sessionId, run);
127	          settle(ev.sessionId);
128	        }
129	        run.emitter.emit("event", ev);
130	      };
131	
132	      (async () => {
133	        try {
134	          const stream = this.queryFn({ prompt: run.input, options });
135	          if (opts.firstText !== undefined) run.input.push(opts.firstText);
136	          for await (const msg of stream) {
137	            for (const ev of toUiEvents(msg)) emit(ev);
138	          }
139	        } catch (err) {
140	          emit({ kind: "error", message: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err) });
141	          if (!resolved) reject(err instanceof Error ? err : new Error(String(err)));
142	        } finally {
143	          run.done = true;
144	          run.emitter.emit("done");
145	          // a resume with a known id resolves even if no init arrived
146	          if (run.sessionId) settle(run.sessionId);
147	        }
148	      })();
149	    });
150	  }
151	
152	  /** Send a user turn to a live run. Returns false if the session isn't live. */
153	  send(sessionId: string, text: string): boolean {
154	    const run = this.runs.get(sessionId);
155	    if (!run || run.done) return false;
156	    run.input.push(text);
157	    return true;
158	  }
159	
160	  /** Subscribe to a run: replays the buffered events, then streams new ones. */
161	  subscribe(sessionId: string, onEvent: (ev: UiEvent) => void): () => void {
162	    const run = this.runs.get(sessionId);
163	    if (!run) return () => {};
164	    for (const ev of run.events) onEvent(ev);
165	    run.emitter.on("event", onEvent);
166	    return () => run.emitter.off("event", onEvent);
167	  }
168	}
169
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-8 2026-05-31 08:56:46Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-8 2026-05-31 08:56:50Z)**_

Now I understand both bugs. Let me trace the root causes:

**Bug 2 (duplicate/wrong reply):** The send button is disabled during a turn, but the `keydown` Enter handler calls `send()` regardless. So while the previous turn is still streaming, the user hits Enter → `addMsg('user', text)` adds the new bubble and sets `assistantEl=null`. The previous turn's *still-streaming* `assistant_text` events then arrive, hit `if(!assistantEl) assistantEl=addMsg(...)`, and create a fresh assistant bubble right under the new user message — filled with the previous round's text.

**Bug 1 (no "generating" indicator):** `startThinking()` does append a "working…" bubble at the bottom, but `clearThinking()` fires on the *first* `assistant_text` event and never comes back — so during tool calls and the rest of the turn there's no in-chat generating indicator.

I'll fix both: make a persistent "生成中…" indicator that stays pinned at the bottom of the chat for the whole turn, and block sending while a turn is active.

252	    setForkEnabled(canFork, ftitle);

254	    if(es){ es.close(); es=null; }
255	    clearThinking(); turnActive=false; var sb=byId('send'); if(sb) sb.disabled=false; setStatus('idle','idle');
256	    if(s.pendingFork){
257	      addMsg('assistant','(forked — type your next message to continue this branch in a new direction)');
258	    } else if(s.file){
259	      fetch('/chat/messages?file='+encodeURIComponent(s.file)).then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(msgs){
260	        if(!msgs.length) addMsg('assistant','(no history yet)');
261	        msgs.forEach(function(m){ if(m.text) addMsg(m.role, m.text); (m.tools||[]).forEach(function(t){ addTool(t); }); });
262	      });
263	    }
264	  }
265	  function openStream(id){
266	    if(es) es.close();
267	    es=new EventSource('/chat/stream?session='+encodeURIComponent(id));
268	    es.onopen=function(){ setStatus(turnActive?'working':'live', turnActive?'working…':'live'); };
269	    es.onmessage=function(e){ onEvent(JSON.parse(e.data)); };
270	    es.onerror=function(){ setStatus('err', (es&&es.readyState===2)?'disconnected':'reconnecting…'); };
271	  }
272	  function onEvent(ev){
273	    if(ev.kind==='assistant_text'){ clearThinking(); if(!assistantEl) assistantEl=addMsg('assistant',''); var b=assistantEl.querySelector('.bubble'); b.textContent+=ev.text; scroll(); }
274	    else if(ev.kind==='tool_use'){ clearThinking(); assistantEl=null; var d=addTool({name:ev.name,input:ev.input}); if(ev.id) toolEls[ev.id]=d; }
275	    else if(ev.kind==='tool_result'){ assistantEl=null; var t=ev.id?toolEls[ev.id]:null;
276	      if(t){ var o=t.querySelector('.tool-out'); o.textContent=String(ev.text||'').slice(0,8000); o.style.display=''; if(ev.isError) o.className='tool-out err'; }
277	      else { addTool({name:'result',input:null,result:ev.text,isError:ev.isError}); }
278	      scroll(); }
279	    else if(ev.kind==='result'){ assistantEl=null; endTurn(); }
280	    else if(ev.kind==='error'){ clearThinking(); assistantEl=null; addMsg('error','⚠ '+ev.message); turnActive=false; var sb=byId('send'); if(sb) sb.disabled=false; setStatus('err','error'); }
281	  }
282	  function send(){
283	    var inp=byId('input'); var text=inp.value.trim(); if(!text||!cur) return;
284	    if(cur.pendingFork){ materializeFork(cur,text); return; }
285	    if(!cur.sessionId) return;
286	    addMsg('user',text); inp.value=''; assistantEl=null;
287	    turnActive=true; byId('send').disabled=true; startThinking();

282	  function send(){
283	    var inp=byId('input'); var text=inp.value.trim(); if(!text||!cur) return;
284	    if(cur.pendingFork){ materializeFork(cur,text); return; }
285	    if(!cur.sessionId) return;
286	    addMsg('user',text); inp.value=''; assistantEl=null;
287	    turnActive=true; byId('send').disabled=true; startThinking();
288	    var id=cur.sessionId, cwd=cur.cwd||'';
289	    fetch('/chat/send?session='+encodeURIComponent(id)+'&cwd='+encodeURIComponent(cwd),{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
290	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){
291	        if(res.ok){ if(!es) openStream(id); }
292	        else { addMsg('error','⚠ '+(res.error||'send failed — this session may no longer be running')); endTurn(); }
293	      })
294	      .catch(function(e){ addMsg('error','⚠ network error: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)); endTurn(); });
295	  }
296	  function fork(){
297	    if(!cur||!cur.sessionId){ alert('Pick a session on the left before splitting.'); return; }
298	    if(cur.vendor!=='claude'){ alert('In-browser split is Claude-only. Use the terminal launcher to fork a Codex session.'); return; }
299	    if(cur.pendingFork){ byId('input').focus(); return; }
300	    // Open the branch immediately, empty and ready. The real fork is materialized
301	    // lazily on the first message: the Agent SDK only mints the new session id once
302	    // it has a turn to diverge on, so we defer the actual /chat/fork until send().
303	    // If you'd already typed something, that becomes the branch's opening turn —
304	    // "I typed this, but it's better off as a split" — and we materialize now.
305	    var inp=byId('input'); var text=inp.value.trim();
306	    var ns={vendor:'claude',sessionId:'pending-'+Date.now(),pendingFork:{parent:cur.sessionId,cwd:cur.cwd||''},title:'(fork) '+(cur.title||''),cwd:cur.cwd,project:cur.project,file:'',ageDays:0,prompts:0,actions:0,brief:cur.brief};
307	    SESS.unshift(ns); select(ns);
308	    if(text){ materializeFork(ns,text); } else { inp.focus(); }
309	  }
310	  // Turn a pending fork into a real session using its first message.
311	  function materializeFork(branch,text){
312	    var inp=byId('input'); byId('msgs').innerHTML=''; addMsg('user',text); inp.value=''; assistantEl=null;
313	    turnActive=true; byId('send').disabled=true; startThinking();
314	    fetch('/chat/fork?session='+encodeURIComponent(branch.pendingFork.parent)+'&cwd='+encodeURIComponent(branch.pendingFork.cwd),
315	      {method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
316	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){ if(!res.ok){ addMsg('error','⚠ '+(res.error||'fork failed')); endTurn(); return; }
317	        branch.sessionId=res.session; branch.pendingFork=null;
318	        if(cur===branch){ renderSidebar(); setForkEnabled(true,'branch this session into a fork'); }
319	        openStream(res.session); })
320	      .catch(function(e){ addMsg('error','⚠ fork failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)); endTurn(); });
321	  }
322	  function newSession(){
323	    var dir=byId('ndfree').value.trim()||byId('ndsel').value; var text=byId('np').value.trim();
324	    if(!dir){ byId('nmsg').textContent='pick or paste a directory'; return; }
325	    if(!text){ byId('nmsg').textContent='type a first message'; return; }
326	    fetch('/chat/new?cwd='+encodeURIComponent(dir),{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
327	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){ if(!res.ok){ byId('nmsg').textContent=res.error||'failed'; return; }
328	        var ns={vendor:'claude',sessionId:res.session,title:text,cwd:dir,project:(dir.split(/[\\\\/]/).pop()),file:'',ageDays:0,prompts:1,actions:0,brief:null};
329	        SESS.unshift(ns); select(ns); addMsg('user',text);
330	        turnActive=true; byId('send').disabled=true; startThinking(); openStream(res.session);
331	        byId('np').value=''; byId('nmsg').textContent=''; byId('newbox').classList.remove('open'); });
332	  }
333	
334	  sortSessions();
335	  renderSidebar();
336	  byId('send').onclick=send;
337	  byId('forkBtn').onclick=fork;
338	  byId('nbtn').onclick=newSession;
339	  byId('newToggle').onclick=function(){ byId('newbox').classList.toggle('open'); };
340	  byId('input').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey&&!e.isComposing){ e.preventDefault(); send(); } });
341	})();
342	</script>
343	</body>

258	    addMsg('user',text); inp.value=''; assistantEl=null;
259	    var id=cur.sessionId, cwd=cur.cwd||'';
260	    fetch('/chat/send?session='+encodeURIComponent(id)+'&cwd='+encodeURIComponent(cwd),{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
261	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){ if(res.ok){ if(!es) openStream(id); } else { addMsg('error','⚠ '+(res.error||'send failed')); } });
262	  }
263	  function fork(){
264	    if(!cur||!cur.sessionId){ alert('Pick a session on the left before splitting.'); return; }
265	    if(cur.vendor!=='claude'){ alert('In-browser split is Claude-only. Use the terminal launcher to fork a Codex session.'); return; }
266	    if(cur.pendingFork){ byId('input').focus(); return; }
267	    // Open the branch immediately, empty and ready. The real fork is materialized
268	    // lazily on the first message: the Agent SDK only mints the new session id once
269	    // it has a turn to diverge on, so we defer the actual /chat/fork until send().
270	    // If you'd already typed something, that becomes the branch's opening turn —
271	    // "I typed this, but it's better off as a split" — and we materialize now.
272	    var inp=byId('input'); var text=inp.value.trim();
273	    var ns={vendor:'claude',sessionId:'pending-'+Date.now(),pendingFork:{parent:cur.sessionId,cwd:cur.cwd||''},title:'(fork) '+(cur.title||''),cwd:cur.cwd,project:cur.project,file:'',ageDays:0,prompts:0,actions:0,brief:cur.brief};
274	    SESS.unshift(ns); select(ns);
275	    if(text){ materializeFork(ns,text); } else { inp.focus(); }
276	  }
277	  // Turn a pending fork into a real session using its first message.
278	  function materializeFork(branch,text){
279	    var inp=byId('input'); byId('msgs').innerHTML=''; addMsg('user',text); inp.value=''; assistantEl=null;
280	    fetch('/chat/fork?session='+encodeURIComponent(branch.pendingFork.parent)+'&cwd='+encodeURIComponent(branch.pendingFork.cwd),
281	      {method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
282	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){ if(!res.ok){ addMsg('error','⚠ '+(res.error||'fork failed')); return; }
283	        branch.sessionId=res.session; branch.pendingFork=null;
284	        if(cur===branch){ renderSidebar(); setForkEnabled(true,'branch this session into a fork'); }
285	        openStream(res.session); })
286	      .catch(function(e){ addMsg('error','⚠ fork failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)); });
287	  }
288	  function newSession(){
289	    var dir=byId('ndfree').value.trim()||byId('ndsel').value; var text=byId('np').value.trim();
290	    if(!dir){ byId('nmsg').textContent='pick or paste a directory'; return; }
291	    if(!text){ byId('nmsg').textContent='type a first message'; return; }
292	    fetch('/chat/new?cwd='+encodeURIComponent(dir),{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({text:text})})
293	      .then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(res){ if(!res.ok){ byId('nmsg').textContent=res.error||'failed'; return; }
294	        var ns={vendor:'claude',sessionId:res.session,title:text,cwd:dir,project:(dir.split(/[\\\\/]/).pop()),file:'',ageDays:0,prompts:1,actions:0,brief:null};
295	        SESS.unshift(ns); select(ns); addMsg('user',text); openStream(res.session);
296	        byId('np').value=''; byId('nmsg').textContent=''; byId('newbox').classList.remove('open'); });
297	  }
298	
299	  sortSessions();
300	  renderSidebar();
301	  byId('send').onclick=send;
302	  byId('forkBtn').onclick=fork;
303	  byId('nbtn').onclick=newSession;
304	  byId('newToggle').onclick=function(){ byId('newbox').classList.toggle('open'); };
305	  byId('input').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey&&!e.isComposing){ e.preventDefault(); send(); } });
306	})();
307	</script>
308	</body>
309	</html>`;
310	}
311
```
